title: Tempting Molten Vietnamese Semolina Grill
description: A winey and molten Vietnamese dish featuring semolina and bhuna, perfect for a meal prep dinner
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together semolina, fish sauce, soy sauce, and brown sugar
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook on the raclette grill for 5-6 minutes per side
In a small saucepan, heat the bhuna sauce over medium heat
Add the red wine to the saucepan and stir to combine
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes
Serve the chicken with the molten bhuna sauce and garnish with chopped green onions
Drizzle with sesame oil and serve immediately
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
